hSub: Premium motorcycle expeditions across the world's most breathtaking archipelago. Bali, Komodo, Sumba — real roads, real adventure.

tours.name: Bali to Komodo
tours.desc: The ride that defines us. 12 days across 4 islands — from Bali's spiritual heart to the prehistoric shores of Komodo.

tours.name: 7 Islands Hopping
tours.desc: 13 days of tropical paradise. Adventure mixed with relaxation — turquoise waters, hidden beaches, island roads forever.

tours.name: Sumba Challenge
tours.desc: The wildest island in Indonesia. Raw landscapes, traditional villages, and roads almost no one has ridden.

tours.name: Bali to Jakarta
tours.desc: Cross the Ring of Fire. Fourteen days through Java's volcanic spine — ancient temples, jungle roads and the crossing from paradise to the capital.

reviews.q: Thirteen days, seven islands, zero regrets. I have done trips across Southeast Asia but nothing comes close to this. B2K made it look easy.
reviews.name: Tyler B.

reviews.q: I was skeptical about a guided motorcycle tour but this converted me. Small group, world-class roads, genuinely off-the-beaten-path. Already planning the Komodo route.
reviews.name: Sarah K.

reviews.q: Did the Bali to Komodo route for my 40th birthday. The ferry crossing with the bikes, the Komodo dragons, the empty volcanic roads — I will never forget it.
reviews.name: James M.

reviews.q: Coming from Australia I was looking for something genuinely adventurous. This delivered. The team knows every road, every stop, every sunset spot.
reviews.name: Marcus R.

reviews.q: Third time with B2K and I keep coming back. It does not feel like a tour — it feels like riding with friends who know every hidden road in Indonesia.
reviews.name: Marco K.

reviews.q: From Vancouver to Bali — best decision I made last year. The Sumbawa roads are empty and perfect. Already locked in for 2026.
reviews.name: Chloe D.

reviews.q: As a rider from Texas I thought I had seen good roads. Indonesia blew my mind. B2K handles everything so you just focus on the ride.
reviews.name: David W.

reviews.q: Sydney to Bali and back with the best two weeks in between. The moment we crested the hill above Labuan Bajo I had tears in my eyes.
reviews.name: Emma T.

reviews.q: I was nervous about my riding level but the guide adapted everything perfectly. The landscapes are out of this world and the group energy was incredible.
reviews.name: Sophie L.
